mapper.sql: id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_role (id, role_name, role_code, description, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{id}, #{roleName}, #{roleCode}, #{description}, #{status}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_role ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT r.id, r.role_name, r.role_code, r.description, r.status, r.create_time, r.update_time FROM t_role r INNER JOIN t_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId}
